action.reasoning: Observation: The GIN model with Virtual Nodes achieved an AP of 0.2213 after 30 epochs. The iteration took ~37.5 minutes. Analysis: The model is performing well and we have plenty of time (4.8 hours left). To improve performance further, I will increase the model capacity by making it deeper (7 layers instead of 5) and wider (400 hidden dimensions instead of 300). I will also add residual connections across the GIN layers to help with training the deeper network. I will train for 40 epochs to allow the larger model to converge. Decision: Update model.py with residual connections, update train.py and predict.py with the new hyperparameters, and train for 40 epochs.
